name: flux-llm-kb
description: Global local-first knowledge kernel for Codex and MCP-capable agents.

interface.longDescription: Flux LLM-KB captures, searches, and briefs local interaction and corpus memory through a PostgreSQL/pgvector knowledge kernel, with privacy-aware hooks and operational dashboard status.
defaultPrompt: Use Flux LLM-KB to retrieve relevant project memory before starting non-trivial work

Use normal kb.brief/search for broad context; broad search/brief excludes code by default, so when broad lookup should return code pass filters={"file_kinds":["code"]} with the query or use kb.code_search / kb.code_symbol_lookup
Use Flux LLM-KB for concise redacted durable saves of reusable mid-turn outcomes when decisions, fixes, procedures, commands, or verified project facts should be retrievable before the turn ends
Make final responses indexable for Flux LLM-KB by summarizing decisions, files changed or referenced, commands/tests run, and unresolved gaps without including secrets
